docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-11-2025 CONTINUED TO JUN-10-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REESE, LUVINA $13,233.75 PRINCIPAL, $446.02 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,679.77, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75751306)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75751306), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SERVED AUG-26-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE AUG-27-2024 AS TO DEFENDANT REESE, LUVINA
DECLARATION OF PROPER VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 73730025) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $446.02 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 75751306) AS TO DEFENDANT REESE, LUVINA

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 73730025) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT REESE, LUVINA NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-15-2025
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-10-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
